triples.subject: electric vehicles (EVs)
triples.sentence: All forms of electric vehicles (EVs) can help improve fuel economy, lower fuel costs, and reduce emissions.

triples.subject: transportation sector
triples.object: greenhouse gas emissions in the United States
triples.sentence: The transportation sector is the largest source of greenhouse gas emissions in the United States.

triples.subject: manufacturers of electric vehicles
triples.sentence: Several manufacturers of electric vehicles are offering 8-year/100,000-mile battery warranties.

triples.subject: today’s batteries
triples.sentence: Predictive modeling by the National Renewable Energy Laboratory indicates that today’s batteries may last 12 to 15 years in moderate climates (8 to 12 years in extreme climates).

triples.subject: number of publicly accessible charging stations in the United States
triples.sentence: The number of publicly accessible charging stations in the United States reached more than 60,000 in 2024, offering more than 162,000 charging ports, according to the Alternative Fueling Station Locator.

triples.subject: transportation sector
triples.sentence: The transportation sector accounts for approximately 30% of total U.S.

triples.subject: all-electric vehicles and PHEVs
triples.sentence: All-electric vehicles and PHEVs have the benefit of flexible charging because the electric grid is near most locations where people park.

triples.subject: public charging stations
triples.sentence: Public charging stations are not as ubiquitous as gas stations.
